resources.string: Pick an add-on to view details and install it.
Choose a Synastria folder to install add-ons and scan snapshots.
Search or filter the Synastria add-on catalog. The app refreshes the central manifest when online and falls back to the bundled catalog offline.

This app does not bundle a Windows or Wine environment. If you want Classic WoW on Android, you need something like Winlator (or another trusted project you choose), then run the Windows build of the companion and the game inside that guest. If you do not have such an app yet, install one from a source you trust (for many users, that is the official Winlator project).
The project docs list other paths and caveats (forks, guests, and credentials).
No folder selected. Use “Choose folder” and pick the drive or folder that contains your Synastria (or shared Winlator storage). The app only sees what you select.

The chart above is your attune view on this device. To update from the Windows companion, open Sync and scan an easy one-day QR, a dense multi-day QR, or paste the full AHC1 log. To load from your Synastria tree, use Play → Library and scan AttuneHelper.lua.
Open Sync to scan PC QR
Scan AttuneHelper to save daily points here.
Tap a bar or point to see TF / WF / LF for that date.
Scan AHC-Q1 for one easy day, AHC-Q2 for a dense multi-day QR that needs good light, or paste AHC1 for the full log.
Aim at an AHC-Q1 or dense AHC-Q2 QR
Paste AHC1:… full log, AHC-Q2:… multi-day QR text, or AHC-Q1:… one-day QR text
Pick an addon, then install. Needs the Synastria folder with write access. GitHub “main” or “master” zip is used; some repos need a different branch in a future version.
Opens the mainline Winlator app if it is installed. The game and Windows companion run inside Winlator; this Android screen only helps files and history on the host.
No data yet. Open Sync and scan the desktop Attune chart QR, or use Library to scan AttuneHelper.lua from this device.

~7 KB limit per tap. Sends attune data (full or one day) and sometimes a gzip’d AttuneHelper.lua from your last scan. Add-ons and full WTF trees are too big for NFC—use download or USB/file copy. Tap Prepare, then hold phones back-to-back; both sides use this app in the foreground.
NFC is not available on this device.
Turn on NFC in system settings to use this.
Ready to send. If the message is too large, only the latest day is sent. AttuneHelper.lua is included when it still fits after gzip.
Nothing to send yet. Scan a snapshot or import a code first.
Another device sent attune data. Merging it can add or change rows in this device’s history, the same as pasting a sync code.
